info.name: TripPlanner API — Full
info.description:
TripPlanner API.

Start: Admin > Auth > POST Login (sets {{token}}).
Images: Admin > Upload > POST Upload File (sets {{uploadKey}}).
Packages: use S3 keys in images[] — not blob: URLs.

body.raw:
{
  "customerName": "John Doe",
  "customerContact": "john@mail.com",
  "totalCost": 15000,
  "title": "Jaipur Heritage Tour",
  "description": "3 day curated trip",
  "isEnabled": false
}

item.name: Packages
item.description: Use multipart/form-data: JSON arrays as strings for highlights, included, itinerary. Upload file field for cover image (S3).

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Jaipur Tours",
  "price": 15000,
  "duration": "5D/4N",
  "summary": "Test Package",
  "description": "Test Package",
  "groupSize": "2-6 People",
  "rating": 4.8,
  "highlights": [
    "Amer Fort",
    "Hawa mahal",
    "Jal Mahal & Nahargarh Fort"
  ],
  "included": [
    "4 Star Hotel",
    "Luxury Car"
  ],
  "itinerary": [
    {
      "day": 1,
      "title": "Day 1",
      "activity": "Test One"
    }
  ],
  "images": [
    "{{uploadKey}}"
  ],
  "status": "active"
}

{
  "title": "Jaipur Tours",
  "price": 15000,
  "duration": "3D/2N",
  "summary": "This is a test card",
  "description": "This is a test package.",
  "highlights": [
    "Amer Fort",
    "Hawa Mahal"
  ],
  "groupSize": "9 People",
  "rating": 5,
  "included": [
    "4 Star Hotel",
    "Luxury Car",
    "Accommodation"
  ],
  "images": [
    "{{uploadKey}}"
  ],
  "itinerary": [
    {
      "day": 1,
      "title": "Test Day 1",
      "activity": "Test Activities"
    },
    {
      "day": 2,
      "title": "Test Day 2",
      "activity": "Test Activities"
    }
  ],
  "status": "inactive"
}

{
  "siteName": "Jaipur Tourism",
  "tagline": "Discover the Pink City",
  "contactEmail": "hello@jaipurtourism.com",
  "contactPhone": "+91 98765 43210",
  "address": "Jaipur, Rajasthan, India",
  "facebookUrl": "https://facebook.com/jaipurtourism",
  "instagramUrl": "https://instagram.com/jaipurtourism",
  "twitterUrl": "https://twitter.com/jaipurtourism",
  "defaultMetaTitle": "Jaipur Tourism — Plan Your Royal Getaway",
  "defaultMetaDescription": "Book curated heritage, adventure, and cultural experiences in Jaipur.",
  "logo": "{{uploadKey}}",
  "favicon": "{{uploadKey}}"
}
